task_completion.description: Open the FZK-Haus residential building model in the BIM software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender/Bonsai interface is visible with the FZK-Haus model loaded, showing architectural elements in the viewport or the spatial hierarchy (IfcProject, IfcBuilding, IfcSpace) in the Outliner.

task_completion.description: Add the Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements property set to IfcSpace entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Object Properties panel shows an IfcSpace selected, and the 'Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements' property set has been added to it under the IFC Object Properties section.

task_completion.description: Set WallCovering to 'Paint' and CeilingCovering to 'Plasterboard'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements for an IfcSpace, the 'WallCovering' property contains the value 'Paint' and the 'CeilingCovering' property contains the value 'Plasterboard'.

task_completion.description: Set FloorCovering to 'Timber' for at least two spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties panel shows the 'FloorCovering' property set to a value containing 'Timber' within the Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements of an IfcSpace.

task_completion.description: Set FloorCovering to 'Tile' for at least two spaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties panel shows the 'FloorCovering' property set to a value containing 'Tile' within the Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements of a different IfcSpace.

task_completion.description: Save the updated IFC project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or terminal command showing the file being saved exactly as '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_room_finishes.ifc'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used properties on IfcSpace objects rather than modeling geometric IfcCovering elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Outliner should not show newly created 3D IfcCovering geometry elements. The modifications should be strictly alphanumeric properties attached to existing IfcSpace entities.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual BIM application (Blender/Bonsai) or a valid IFC scripting library.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender GUI being used to navigate and edit the IFC file, or a Python script using IfcOpenShell, rather than just a text editor attempting to manually spoof IFC STEP syntax.

integrity.description: Ensure the file was genuinely exported/saved with the new properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender 'Export IFC' or 'Save Project' dialog is visible, confirming the file wasn't just copied via terminal without the required property modifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output file: /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_room_finishes.ifc. Required Property Set: Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements. Minimum spaces to be modified: 4. The model being edited is the FZK-Haus residential building (fzk_haus.ifc).
